since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.79%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.36% · BTC +0.03% · Gold +0.62% · Nasdaq100 -0.32%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.79%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.79%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -11.54%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.28%, POWL +5.06%, ORCL +4.37%, AAPL +4.06%, PINS +3.65%. Laggards: DELL -11.54%, SKHY -7.93%, MU -7.39%, MRVL -6.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.54% at $135.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
